name: tensorfeed
description: Real-time AI ecosystem data: news, model pricing, service status, signed decision verdicts, time series, model comparison, webhook watches, plus a discovery tool for the full TensorFeed data catalog.
long_description:
TensorFeed gives Claude live, machine-readable insight into the AI industry plus public-domain US-government data feeds. About two dozen core tools plus find_tensorfeed_data, a discovery tool that surfaces the rest of the TensorFeed catalog (model deprecations, MCP registry, GitHub and papers trending, AI CVEs, x402 market data, USGS earthquakes, NWS weather alerts, agent-readiness and crawler-access maps, and more), all of which remain callable as HTTP endpoints on tensorfeed.ai.

Free tier (no key, no payment): AI news from 50+ sources with an optional daily digest mode, current model pricing across labs, AI service status with 2-minute polling and downtime detection, the signed verdict family at its free preview tier, and 1 to 7 day pricing, benchmark, status, and uptime time series.

Paid tier (USDC on Base via x402, 1 credit per call): full-tier verdicts, 8 to 90 day time series, leaderboard rankings, what's-new digest, model comparison, provider deep-dives, webhook watches with daily and weekly digests, and account status. The signed verdict family covers best-model routing, provider reliability, x402 market and single-publisher trust, AI-stack safety gating, benchmark trust, provider failover, and CVE SSVC remediation, each an AFTA-signed decision with a free preview and a 1-credit full tier.

Covered by AFTA, an open standard for fair-trade agent APIs: every paid call returns an Ed25519-signed receipt, and code-enforced no-charge paths protect the agent from being billed for upstream errors. Welcome bonus of 50 free credits on first wallet payment, no accounts.
